title: Satisfying Totems [Full]
description: Meme Resource-pack, that adds popular tiktok videos to Minecraft
body:
# Satisfying Totems v0.1 Meme Resource-pack, that adds a popular TikTok/Shorts videos to Minecraft. # How to use? The resource pack has different versions, which differ by the added totems.
CIT Version [​full version] [Download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DGnN025T/versions/GfKRJ5kK/%C2%A7a%C2%A7l%5BSTotems%5D%20%C2%A72%C2%A7lFull.zip) Adds support for Optifine (or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)). It becomes possible to rename totems and get a unique texture. | Preview | Name | Source | |---------------------|---------------------|---------------------| | ![Bears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58526a4fca5c951e0811499dd558f83946eb1938.gif) | `bears` | [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1C-3IirtZMo) | | ![Parkour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b44931934fa4aff19bf441c7c581a655e28843c.gif) | `parkour` | [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XBIaqOm0RKQ) | | ![GTA 5 Rump](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/299b2d9ee61a51f00acf0ee1a9215c5dd0f731bf.gif) | `gta` | [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VS3D8bgYhf4) | ![Cluster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a69d7bbd71d6cfc66937fb15c3794d1926e70086.gif) | `cluster` | [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uVKxtdMgJVU) | | ![Subway](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccea474a6e82a99eb9851a7dca97f43dc1f1865a.gif) | `subway` | [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i0M4ARe9v0Y) |
Global Version [​lite version] SOON
# TODO LIST AND NEXT UPDATES - [Respackopts support](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts). - CustomModelData for each Totem [analog for CIT] # Check also! | CHECK THIS! | CHECK THIS! | |:---------------------:|:---------------------:| | | | | [Compact Status](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/compact-status) | [CraftVerse Panaramas](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/craftverse-panoramas) |
